context_envelope.detail: The first served envelope is bounded to short-context technical reasoning. Requests above the direct window must route or refuse instead of stretching the learned lane silently.

latency_envelope.detail: The first served envelope publishes one bounded latency band for short-context technical reasoning rather than claiming generic assistant responsiveness.

task_examples: bounded architecture tradeoff analysis under the published context window
short-context systems reasoning over curated technical material
regions.detail: The learned lane can answer bounded technical reasoning requests directly when they stay within the published context and latency envelope.

task_examples: compare two protocol or ISA manual excerpts within the published context window
synthesize a bounded summary across committed spec sections
regions.detail: The learned lane can directly serve bounded spec and manual synthesis inside the published context envelope.

task_examples: requests that need exact execution or verifier-backed answers
requests that need symbolic or compiled confirmation instead of learned approximation
regions.detail: Exact or verifier-backed requests stay in the served envelope only through explicit executor handoff.

task_examples: requests whose prompt exceeds the published hard refusal threshold
requests that try to force long-context service outside the declared envelope
regions.detail: Requests beyond the published hard context boundary must refuse instead of silently truncating or over-claiming long-context support.

task_examples: questions that depend on current events or fresh external state
questions that depend on hidden run bundles or unpublished artifacts
regions.detail: Freshness-sensitive or hidden-artifact requests must refuse instead of pretending the served lane has currentness or hidden tool visibility.

task_examples: general-purpose open-ended chat outside bounded technical reasoning
regions.detail: The first served Psion lane is not a generic assistant and does not publish broad open-ended chat support.

claim_boundary: This publication covers a bounded served learned lane for short-context technical reasoning, spec/manual synthesis, explicit executor handoff, and explicit refusal on over-context, freshness-sensitive, hidden-artifact, and generic-assistant regions. It does not publish a general assistant, currentness-aware, or hidden-tool-aware model.
